summary: Add `podcast voice design`: prompt-based signature voice creation persisted into a show-bible cast entry.
reason: The design endpoint can create a reusable show voice without the repeated multipart file parts required by cloning, so this hand-authored workflow ships the unblocked voice path while clone remains intentionally out of scope.
validated_outcome: go build ./...; go vet ./...; go test ./...; govulncheck ./...; python3 .github/scripts/verify-skill/verify_skill.py --dir library/ai/elevenlabs/
